description: Top-level JSON ARRAY of tool-call objects emitted as plain-text content. Provenance: PR #55 code review, detector-gap family (2) verified by execution -- the detector required a top-level object, so the array passed both seams raw. Fixed by unwrapping a top-level array; disposition follows the FIRST call (here a known READ, search_assets), which is recovered exactly once -- bounded by seen_call_keys -- and the trailing call is dropped, never executed. The model's next completion is the real answer the user sees.

turns.content: Here are the assets you asked about: P-201, the cooling water pump in Building A.

user_text_contains: Here are the assets you asked about
